chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – The enforcement of the bequest upon its commandments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/26)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/26)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ رَجُلًا أَوْصَى إِلَيَّ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ فِي السَّبِيلِ فَقَالَ لِيَ اصْرِفْهُ فِي الْحَجِّ قَالَ قُلْتُ لَهُ أَوْصَى إِلَيَّ فِي السَّبِيلِ قَالَ اصْرِفْهُ فِي الْحَجِّ فَإِنِّي لَا أَعْلَمُ شَيْئاً مِنْ سَبِيلِهِ أَفْضَلَ مِنَ الْحَجِّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammmad Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Al Husayn Bin Umar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A man (in Wilayah) bequeathed something in the Way (Jihad)’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Spend it regarding the Hajj’. I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘He bequeathed to me (to be in) the Way (Jihad)’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Spend it regarding the Hajj, for I<sup>asws</sup> do not know of anything from His<sup>azwj</sup> Way being superior than the Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Sulayman from al- Husayn ibn ‘Umar who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who has made a will to spend in the way of Allah. He (the Imam) said to me to spend it for al-Haj j . I said that he has said to spend it in the way of Allah. He (the Imam) said, ‘Spend for al-Hajj because I do not see anything in His way better than al-Hajj.”’
